scenes.narration: Bhai sun, ye Idempotency in APIs ki ek mistake teri ₹35-55LPA ki Razorpay offer cancel kara dega.
Without understanding Idempotency in APIs, systems fail at scale. Here's why it matters.
Think of Idempotency in APIs like a traffic cop at a busy intersection — directing flow efficiently.
The core mechanism of Idempotency in APIs: it distributes work, manages state, and handles failures gracefully.
Key properties of Idempotency in APIs: fault tolerance, horizontal scalability, and low latency.
Real-world example: companies like Netflix and Uber use Idempotency in APIs to serve millions of users daily.
Quick recap: Idempotency in APIs solves scale. Remember: distribute, monitor, and failover. That's the pattern.
